generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. A calm and powerful anthropomorphic leopard cat on a throne floating on the open sea, looking ahead with balanced wisdom. He holds a golden cup and a short scepter. A fish and a ship are in the distant sea. Deep, stable blues and greens. High-fidelity Taiwan leopard cat features (forehead stripes, ear spots). Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The King of Cups is 'The Balanced Master'—the mature male leopard cat that maintains emotional stability and wisdom even in a vast, changing world.

meanings.upright: Emotional balance, emotional control, generosity, wisdom, and compassionate leadership.
meanings.reversed: Emotional instability, manipulation, moody behavior, or a lack of self-control.

ecology.mapping_note: King of Cups represents 'The Long-Range Vision'—the ability of an alpha male to navigate and protect territory across large, potentially disconnected landscapes.

website.excerpt: Floating on the open sea of the soul, the King of Cups maintains his calm and wisdom, regardless of the waves below.
website.seo_description: King of Cups reimagined as a wise leopard cat on a floating throne in a stable sea scape.
